title: TBD Map Object Region (forest / field / waterBody)
description: A first-class area region (N5). Forests are derived at export from kind=tree instance density + concave/alpha hull (source=derived-hull) OR ingested from an Enfusion vegetation/forest mask (source=engine-mask). Ship gate: byRegionKind.forest.treeCount + unassignedTrees = type-inventory byKind.tree.instances (exact integer equality). Rendered as polygon fill at deckZoom ≤ FOREST_REGION_MAX_ZOOM (N3), never as per-tree icons at low zoom.

polygon.description: One or more linear rings in world meters. Ring = array of [x,y] vertices (>=4, closed).
